title: BronzeMaceLimit
description: This plugin add limit for craft mace - 1 mace on server
body:
**BronzeMaceLimit**

This plugin limits the crafting of bronze maces. Each player can craft a mace only once. If the mace is lost or broken, a second chance is given via command.

**Command:**
- `/checkartifacts` — check if mace crafting is available

**How it works:**
- First craft — always available
- After loss — command shows the status
- If status is positive — you can craft again
